about: My name is Jinwen Pan (潘劲文). I am a master's student in computational science and engineering at the Technical University of Munich. Before Munich, I completed a B.S. in materials physics at Fudan University.
research: I am interested in high-performance computing, scientific computing, computer architecture, and computer network. Specifically, I am excited about developing efficient algorithms and architectures that theoretically optimize performance while also demonstrating empirical scalability and robustness in real-world scientific applications.
email: jinwen DOT pan AT tum DOT de
